description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, predominantly colored in red with black and white geometric accents. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, giving the aircraft a delta-like appearance. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and two sharply angled horizontal stabilizers, contributing to its aerodynamic profile. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a dark canopy. No visible engines are mounted externally, suggesting they may be integrated within the fuselage. The overall design is reminiscent of a high-speed jet, optimized for agility and performance.
description: A red, black, and white swept-wing airplane with a pointed nose, low-mounted wings, and a single vertical tail fin. The cockpit is forward and enclosed, giving it a modern, aerodynamic look.
description_view_0: From above, the airplane's delta-shaped wings and pointed nose are prominent, with geometric patterns visible on the wings and fuselage.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the low-mounted, swept-back wings and the sharply tapered fuselage, as well as the angular tail section.
description_view_2: From below, the airplane's underbelly and the full span of the wings are visible, along with the single vertical stabilizer and the rear fuselage taper.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same swept-back wings, angular tail, and streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No externally visible engines; likely internal jet configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two sharply angled horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy, likely single-seat.
